elements: card (white bg, 4px radius, 1px grey border) with section heading (icon + title)
definition-list key/value table (key bold, value regular, 1px divider between rows)
notes: Two stacked cards: 'Build information' and 'Runtime information'. Each renders as a card with icon-title header and a dense 2-col key/value table.
Value column includes untypographed raw strings (revisions, hashes, go versions). No code/mono font used.
Date/time values shown as ISO 8601 ('2026-04-05T20:00:28Z') — consistency check against other pages.
'Configuration Reload: Successful' shown as plain text — other pages might show status pills for similar semantics. Potential normalization opportunity.
